reviews.review_description:
This game is very good and goofy but I have a few ideas that would make it more fun. First of all I would make the maps smaller so it is easier to traverse them (mainly just for city) and in the zero gravity add some sort of movement because I was stuck in there for a good few minutes because I had jumped at a low speed. I love the design of the monkeys especially their head. I loved trying to complete the obstacle coarse in the ice place too. Also do any of the mods play the game because it has just been me and my friend 


EDIT: I miss the old monkey avatar that was one of my favourite things about the game

developer_response.body: Well At Least We Have Grown. Thank You For Being An OG!

reviews.review_description: You know why this game sucks,because I got banned for no reason and also my friend got banned for no reason.And that’s why this game sucks don’t get it.

developer_response.body:
You And Your Friend Probably Broke The Rules We Do Not Ban People For No Reason
A Couple Of Reasons For You/Your Friends Ban Could Be:
-Asking For Moderator (This Is Strictly Forbidden)
-Calling The Owner A Furry (The Only Reason He Wears The Cat Ears Is For His Dead Cat Smokey)
These Are The 2 Most Common Reasons
If You Or Your Friends Ban Is Permanent There Could Be A Mistake Please Dm A Photo Of Proof Of A Permanent Ban If You Are Permanently Banned To ultrasnowy543real On Discord To Get Your Ban Revoked
